news.t: Citi Supports the Industry's Largest Mutual Fund to ETF Conversion
Dimensional just converted $30 billion worth of mutual funds to ETFs. What it could mean for the industry

holdings.infoBox: DFUS is an equity ETF with a total of 2245 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 6.94%, Apple at 6.22%, Microsoft at 4.19%, Amazon.com at 3.46%, and Alphabet at 3.11%.

overview.description: The Dimensional U.S. Equity Market ETF (DFUS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund actively selects US equities of all sizes weighted by market capitalization in seeking to provide long-term capital appreciation. DFUS was launched on Sep 25, 2001 and is issued by Dimensional.

data.title: ETF Edge: Returns tend to be strong and positive after sharp downturns, says Dimensional's O'Reilly
data.text: Gerard O'Reilly, Dimensional Fund Advisors co-CEO, joins the 'Halftime Report' to discuss the markets and what investors should do after the big sell-off.

data.title: Citi Supports the Industry's Largest Mutual Fund to ETF Conversion
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Citi has successfully supported the industry's largest mutual fund to ETF conversion for Dimensional Fund Advisors. The conversion includes four US tax-managed mutual funds ...

data.title: Dimensional just converted $30 billion worth of mutual funds to ETFs. What it could mean for the industry
data.text: The exchange-traded fund format should bolster Dimensional's tax-efficient strategy for some of its mutual funds, the firm's co-CEO says.

data.text: CNBC's Bob Pisani reports on inflows to exchange-traded funds with Dimensional CEO Gerard O'Reilly.
